items.scenario: You recently registered for an eight-week ceramics class at the Glenwood Community Arts Center. The published schedule shows two different start times for the first session, and the website lists a tools fee that the registration confirmation did not mention.
items.direction: Write an email to Ms. Brennan. In your email, do the following:
goals: Describe the schedule discrepancy you found
Ask which start time is correct
Request clarification about the tools fee
items.subject: Schedule and tools-fee clarifications for ceramics class

items.scenario: You have lived in apartment 217 of Cedar Pines Apartments for two months. Hot water in your kitchen tap has been intermittent for the past three weeks, and the dishwasher began making a loud grinding noise that has gotten progressively worse.
items.direction: Write an email to Mr. Donnelly. In your email, do the following:
goals: Explain how they have affected daily use
Ask when a technician can visit
items.subject: Hot water and dishwasher problems in apartment 217

items.scenario: You just completed a ten-week summer internship in the digital analytics team at Northbridge Insurance. Your mentor has invited you to keep contributing remotely during the fall semester, and you need to confirm details about expected hours, scope of projects, and continued mentorship.
items.direction: Write an email to Dr. Okonkwo. In your email, do the following:
goals: Thank your mentor for the continued opportunity
Ask about the expected weekly hours
Describe the kinds of projects you would like to work on
items.subject: Confirming remote internship details for fall semester

items.scenario: You are a regular patron of the Willowbank Public Library and have been attending its monthly evening lecture series for the past year. The library recently moved these talks to weekday afternoons, which conflicts with your work schedule and the schedules of several other working adults.
items.direction: Write an email to Ms. Pemberton. In your email, do the following:
goals: Thank the library for the lecture program
Explain the scheduling problem the new times create
Ask whether the previous evening slot can be restored
items.subject: Scheduling concern about the monthly lecture series
